siteConfig.name: IAC
siteConfig.tagline: Empowering Ethiopia's Next Generation of Innovators
siteConfig.description: The Innovation & Incubation Center (IAC), under the Ministry of Innovation and Technology (MinT), nurtures startups from idea to impact through mentorship, resources, and a thriving innovation ecosystem.

owner.name: Ministry of Innovation and Technology
owner.description: The Ministry of Innovation and Technology drives Ethiopia's digital transformation and innovation agenda.

capabilities.title: Idea Validation
capabilities.description: Transform raw concepts into validated business models with structured frameworks and expert feedback.

capabilities.title: Mentorship Network
capabilities.description: Connect with seasoned entrepreneurs, industry leaders, and technical advisors across sectors.

capabilities.title: Co-Working Spaces
capabilities.description: Modern, fully-equipped workspaces designed for collaboration, focus, and creative breakthroughs.

capabilities.title: Funding Access
capabilities.description: Bridge to grants, angel investors, and venture capital through MinT-backed innovation funds.

capabilities.title: Market Linkage
capabilities.description: Access domestic and international markets through trade missions, expos, and partner networks.

capabilities.title: Tech Infrastructure
capabilities.description: Cloud credits, prototyping labs, and digital tools to accelerate product development.

programs.title: Pre-Incubation
programs.description: For early-stage founders with an idea. Focus on problem validation, customer discovery, and MVP planning.

programs.title: Incubation Program
programs.description: Our flagship program for startups ready to build, launch, and scale their products in the Ethiopian market.

programs.title: Acceleration
programs.description: Intensive growth program for startups with traction, preparing them for Series A and regional expansion.

programs.title: Sector Innovation Labs
programs.description: Specialized tracks in AgriTech, FinTech, HealthTech, EdTech, and Green Energy with domain experts.

services.title: Business Development
services.description: Strategic planning, market research, and go-to-market strategy tailored for the Ethiopian context.

services.title: Legal & Compliance
services.description: Company registration guidance, IP protection, and regulatory navigation for tech startups.

services.title: Financial Advisory
services.description: Financial modeling, bookkeeping support, and preparation for investor due diligence.

services.title: Technical Support
services.description: Software architecture reviews, UX audits, and access to development resources and APIs.

services.title: HR & Talent
services.description: Recruitment support, internship pipelines from universities, and team-building workshops.

services.title: Marketing & Branding
services.description: Brand identity development, digital marketing strategy, and media relations support.

startups.name: AgriSense
startups.description: IoT-powered soil monitoring and crop advisory platform serving 15,000+ smallholder farmers.

startups.name: PayFlow ET
startups.description: Mobile payment and micro-lending platform bridging the financial inclusion gap in rural Ethiopia.

startups.name: MedLink
startups.description: Telemedicine platform connecting patients in underserved areas with specialist physicians.

startups.name: EduSpark
startups.description: Adaptive learning platform delivering personalized education in Amharic and regional languages.

startups.name: GreenGrid
startups.description: Solar micro-grid solutions powering off-grid communities with smart energy management.

startups.name: LogiChain
startups.description: Blockchain-based supply chain transparency platform for Ethiopian coffee exporters.

testimonials.quote: IAC didn't just give us office space — they gave us a roadmap. The mentorship program transformed how we think about scaling in Africa.
testimonials.author: Selam T.

testimonials.quote: As a first-time founder, the legal and financial workshops saved us months of costly mistakes. The MinT ecosystem is truly supportive.
testimonials.author: Daniel M.

testimonials.quote: The sector innovation lab connected us directly with Ministry stakeholders. That access accelerated our pilot deployment by a year.
testimonials.author: Hanna K.

news.title: IAC Opens Applications for 2026 Incubation Cohort
news.excerpt: Applications are now open for our flagship 12-month incubation program. Early-stage tech startups are encouraged to apply.

news.title: Demo Day 2026: 20 Startups Pitch to Global Investors
news.excerpt: Our annual Demo Day brought together investors from across Africa, Europe, and the Middle East to meet Ethiopia's brightest founders.

news.title: MinT Launches FinTech Regulatory Sandbox at IAC
news.excerpt: A new regulatory sandbox enables FinTech startups to test innovative products in a controlled environment with MinT oversight.

news.title: IAC Partners with Leading Universities for Talent Pipeline
news.excerpt: New partnerships with Addis Ababa University and Bahir Dar University create internship and research collaboration pathways.

resources.title: Startup Toolkit
resources.description: Templates for business plans, pitch decks, financial models, and legal checklists.

resources.title: Founder's Guide to Ethiopia
resources.description: Comprehensive guide covering registration, taxation, and regulatory requirements.

resources.title: Webinar Library
resources.description: Recorded sessions on fundraising, product development, and scaling strategies.

resources.title: Investor Directory
resources.description: Curated list of angel investors, VCs, and grant programs active in Ethiopia.

resources.title: IP & Patent Guide
resources.description: Step-by-step guide to protecting intellectual property in Ethiopia and abroad.

resources.title: Market Research Reports
resources.description: Sector analyses for AgriTech, FinTech, HealthTech, and emerging verticals.

values.title: Innovation First
values.description: We champion bold ideas that solve real problems for Ethiopians and beyond.

values.title: Inclusive Growth
values.description: Our programs welcome founders from all backgrounds, regions, and sectors.

values.title: Integrity & Trust
values.description: As a government institution, we uphold the highest standards of transparency.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: We build bridges between startups, government, academia, and industry.

timeline.event: IAC established under MinT to formalize startup support infrastructure.
First incubation cohort launched with 15 startups across 4 sectors.
New co-working facility opened, capacity expanded to 80 startups.
Sector Innovation Labs launched for AgriTech, FinTech, and HealthTech.
120+ alumni startups, national innovation hub network expansion begins.

applicationSteps.title: Submit Application
applicationSteps.description: Complete the online form with your team info, idea summary, and sector.

applicationSteps.title: Initial Screening
applicationSteps.description: Our team reviews applications for fit, potential, and commitment level.

applicationSteps.title: Interview & Pitch
applicationSteps.description: Shortlisted founders present their vision to the selection committee.

applicationSteps.title: Onboarding
applicationSteps.description: Accepted startups join their cohort with a tailored development plan.
